steps.t: Faeron and Rhadrog have traveled to Adagím to investigate the threat that may be inside the abandoned wonder. You should travel to the Folly of Nagakh…
Faeron, Rhadrog, and the Kinta Irsinith will venture into the ancient citadel in Adagím to search for the source of the blight. You should use the Ins…
You have thwarted the plans of Lhaereth the Stained and prevented her from unleashing an ancient Balrog on Mûr Ghala. You should talk to Faeron.
